title: taraxacum rigens
intro: Taraxacum rigens, also known as the stiff dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds and inulin content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against certain diseases. Taraxacum rigens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
